label: addon: ⚔️AnkiArcade (104MB)
description: AnkiArcade is a multi minigame add-on that I am primarily developing. Aiming for quality comparable to indie games, it currently features 40+ animated pixel art characters, 400+ sound effects, 500+ BGM tracks, and 400+ pixel art enemy characters, progress bar, pomodoro timer, and more!

label: addon: 🌱New Cards Farm 2 (607KB)
description: You can grow crops and flowers with the new cards you have learned. Crops 79, Color tooltip, Farmer animation, Random Crops, Replanting Crops, etc.

label: addon: 🦖Dino Timer (910KB)
description: Let's raise dinosaurs from eggs while studying with the Pomodoro timer!

label: addon: 🏆️Anki Leaderboard Plus V3 (115 KB)
description: Leaderboard displayed on top bar and updated in real time during review! This version added sync speed optimization and enhancements, UI for gamification mode, toast notifications for scores, improved tooltip design, and enhanced options, etc. Revenue from this add-on will be used to maintain and enhance the leaderboard Free server.

label: addon: ⌛️Chunk Progressbar (246KB)
description: Progress bars for chunking Anki cards.

label: addon: 🚦Answer text feedback (1.47 MB)
description: In the reviewer display text animation feedback based on your answers. There are features to display card type, due date, and ease (or difficulty).

label: addon: 🎖️Animation coins (1.83 MB)
description: You can add animated coins to the Anki killStreaks.

label: addon: 🎮Virtual Ankipad (930KB)
description: Show colorful answer buttons for the reviewer. This makes the buttons more intuitive to press and visually more enjoyable. Their position can be moved by dragging.

label: addon: 🌽Review Card Farm (580KB)
description: This add-on is a review card version of New Card Farm, basic usage is the same, some new features and options have been added. You can grow crops and flowers with the review cards you have learned. Crops 79, Color tooltip, Farmer animation, Random Crops, Replanting Crops, etc.

label: addon: 🍅Pomotimer (65KB)
description: Circular progress bar with transparent background.

label: addon: 📅New Card Heatmap (6KB)
description: Show calendar and streaks of New cards learned, like the review heatmap.

label: addon: 🎞️Live Wallpaper for Anki (89MB)
description: Display live wallpapers for Anki (Animated wallpaper, Background video). Support for Anki-Home, Reviewer, Overview, and Congrats. The wallpaper video includes 18 types for now! Fireplace, Ocean, River, Galaxy, Cat, etc.

label: addon: 🎂Yearly Heatmap Generator (6MB)
description: Generate all heatmaps as an image (default: 800px PNG). Colors and designs can be customized as options. You can use it when you want to share yearly learning progress or when you want to share Streeck achievements.

label: addon: ⚔️AnkiArcade v1.9.7 (update info)
description: The latest version of AnkiArcade. Added 19 types of animated pixel art characters, and optimized and enhanced a lot of the code, the basic game system is the same.

label: info: ⚔️AnkiArcade v1.8.5 (update info)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Multiple mini games, progress bar, pomodoro timer, and more.

label: addon: ⚔️AnkiKnights and Dragons (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] The knights fight many monsters. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 💎Little Ankimare (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] The hooded protagonist explores a mysterious cave in search of gemstones. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🧟Resident Anki (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Shooting Game with Mini Zombies. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🧟Study with Zombie (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Improved version of Doomanki, zombie emerges. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🐱Meowknight (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Cat knight fighting theme. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🐱Cat Gathering in Anki (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Cats walking and running around. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🎵Mozartanki (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] MIDI music player with 328 classical music tracks. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🧙Redwitch Darkwitch (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Wizard transforms. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🐱Cat Girl and Sushi (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Cute CatGirl eats a lot of Sushi. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: ⭐Ambient (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Ambient sounds such as bonfires and rainfall are played instead of music. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon:🧘Zenmode (in AnkiArcade)
description: [ AnkiArcade ] Turns off all animation, progress bar, and music. This theme is included in the latest version of AnkiArcade.

label: addon: 🔥Just Do Anki timer (12MB)
description: Pomodoro timer with voice and animation that shouts JustDoIt when the time is up.

label: addon: 🔫Doomanki (54MB)
description: Anki addon like FPS game. When you answer, gun animations, gunshot sounds, explosions.

label: addon: 🎨Top toolbar icons (16KB)
description: Decks Add-Browse-Stats-Sync

label: Contact: 🔧Fix broken add-ons
description: You can send me repair requests for broken add-ons.(Free)
